topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Fan Stories

topics.summary: The studio discusses Sirius's growth in the satellite radio market, the impact of Howard Stern's move to satellite on terrestrial stations, and the evolving landscape of local radio competition.

topics.title: Sopranos Cast Scandals and Local News
